name: NANOVIRICIDES, INC.
business: NanoViricides is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company developing antiviral drugs using its nanoviricides platform technology. It has no approved products, no customers, and no revenues. Its lead drug candidate NV-387 is a broad-spectrum antiviral that has completed Phase Ia/Ib safety trial and is being prepared for Phase II efficacy trials for MPox and respiratory viral infections.
sellsTo: No current customers; target markets include patients with viral infections and government biodefense agencies

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage company with our first drug ready to enter Phase II human clinical efficacy trial, having successfully completed Phase Ia/Ib human clinical safety and tolerability trial.
We are seeking non-dilutive funding for progressing NV-387 towards regulatory approval for treatment of Smallpox under the US FDA Animal Rule.

tamClaims.claim: Revenues in the several hundred million dollar range for a successful drug upon approval for biodefense stockpiling
tamClaims.sentence: There is potential for drug development funding by the US Government as well as potential for revenues in several hundred million dollar range for a successful drug upon approval for biodefense stockpiling.
